_note: Cheer Ascension ledger. flow_id null = not yet generated. Entries gain a 'chain' block ONLY via bank.py (receipt + audit + verdict required). Bootstrap-class items (face, t2 card, scene rungs) cannot flow through compose yet (no card:/scene: job kinds — proposed gate extension pending user blessing); their prompts are PRE-COMMITTED in references/bootstrap-prompts.json and pasted verbatim, never freehanded.

inspiration.chosen_start: dforce-cheer-outfit-g8.jpg — anchors render style + uniform construction + slim t2 baseline on a studio backdrop
inspiration.role: style/wardrobe/environment guidance for the BOOTSTRAP prompts only; no Daz product trade-dress, text, or identity is copied; never attached as a generation ref

kelsey-brandt.design: 22, honey-blonde high ponytail with gold scrunchie, bright green eyes, light freckles, soft square face; Comets uniform: deep-teal sleeveless shell top with gold double-stripe trim and a gold comet-streak chest emblem (NO letters), white side panels, sunray-pleated teal/gold/white skirt, white brief shorts beneath (coverage insurance), white cheer shoes

face.qa_notes: V2 picked (dead-front symmetric, ponytail+gold scrunchie, green eyes, freckles). V3 rejected: unspecced gold necklace. V4 rejected: 3/4 angle + loose curls. V1 backup.

2.bootstrap_job: kelsey-t2-card (references/bootstrap-prompts.json prompt v3, pasted verbatim; face card 12c236a4 attached, chip DOM-verified)
2.qa_notes: Attempt 3 (prompt v3). V1 picked: judge-measured height ratio 0.890 vs spec 0.89 (head-top at mannequin chin), uniform/identity/grid/anatomy all clean. V2 0.928 + missing armhole stripes, V3 0.951 + unspecced waist chevron, V4 0.919 chin-anchor miss. Attempts 1-2 (prompts v1/v2) all-failed D7 scale, ratios 0.92-0.98 — see qa/receipts/card_kelsey-t2.attempt{1,2,3}.verdict.json

scene_ladders._note: compose.py refuses any page whose camera-distance rung is not banked here (D8). Rungs are bootstrap-class until the card:/scene: gate extension lands; each rung chains from the previous (wide -> medium -> close).

wide.bootstrap_job: field-wide (references/bootstrap-prompts.json prompt v4, pasted verbatim, no attachments)
wide.qa_notes: USER-ACCEPTED with known deviation (attempt 4 V1): bleacher units step diagonally along the lower-right curve instead of straight sideline-parallel rows; everything else clean (no numerals/goalposts/people, grass+white-paint-only oval, single boundaries, full oval framed with margin, 4 masts lights-off, golden hour). 4 attempts / 16 variants; judge pick was none each round — see qa/receipts/scene_field-wide.attempt{1,2,3,4}.verdict.json. Prompt evolution v1→v4 killed yard numerals, goalposts, concrete-in-oval, low cameras.

medium.bootstrap_job: field-medium (references/bootstrap-prompts.json prompt v2, pasted verbatim; wide rung attached, chip DOM-verified)
medium.qa_notes: Attempt 2 V1 judge-PASS: correct small rail-less aluminum bleacher sections, medium sideline framing w/ bench, palette/track continuity, no people/text. Minor noted drift: section count/placement vs wide rung. Attempt 1 failed 4/4 on grandstand drift (D8 lesson: chained rungs need distinctive construction RE-STATED in prose). Receipts: qa/receipts/scene_field-medium.attempt{1,2}.verdict.json

close.bootstrap_job: field-close (references/bootstrap-prompts.json prompt v1, pasted verbatim; medium rung attached, chip DOM-verified)
close.qa_notes: Attempt 1 V1 judge-PASS first try (V4 d1f7f215 also passed, backup). Sharp foreground stripe/grass, defocused rail-less bleachers, full medium-rung continuity. V2 bench-split glitch, V3 invented infield pole. Receipt: qa/receipts/scene_field-close.attempt1.verdict.json
